description_long: This is a small, rounded cup with a smooth, matte white exterior and a single handle attached to one side. The cup features a subtle decorative motif on its front, resembling a pastel-colored melon slice with faint detailing. The handle is thick and ergonomically shaped, providing a comfortable grip. The cup's rim is wide and slightly thickened, while the base is flat and stable, ensuring it sits securely on flat surfaces. The interior appears to be the same material and color as the exterior, with no visible lining or additional features. The overall design is minimalist, with the decorative element adding a touch of character.
description: A small, rounded white cup with a single handle and a pastel melon slice motif on the front. The surface is smooth and matte, with a simple, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and a pastel melon slice motif on the cup's surface.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible decorative motif.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing a plain white surface without decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the edge of the decorative motif and a plain white surface.
